import React from 'react'; import { Web3Provider } from './contexts/Web3Context'; import Header from './components/Header'; import BridgeForm from './components/BridgeForm'; import { Toaster } from 'react-hot-toast'; import { motion } from 'framer-motion'; function App() { return (
{/* Hero Section */}

Cross-Chain Bridge

Transfer tokens between Ethereum, BSC, and 3DPass networks securely using the trustless counterstake mechanism.

{/* Network Icons */}
ETH
Ethereum
BSC
BSC
3D
3DPass
{/* Bridge Form Section */}
{/* Features Section */}

Why Choose Counterstake Bridge?

Our bridge uses a unique counterstake mechanism that ensures security and trustlessness across all supported networks.

Trustless Security

No trusted intermediaries. The counterstake mechanism ensures honest behavior through economic incentives.

Fast Transfers

Automated assistant contracts speed up transfers while maintaining security through the counterstake mechanism.

Decentralized

Governed by the community through on-chain voting. All parameters can be updated through decentralized governance.

{/* How It Works Section */}

How It Works

The counterstake bridge process is simple and secure

{[ { step: '1', title: 'Initiate Transfer', description: 'Select source and destination networks, enter amount and destination address.', icon: '🚀', }, { step: '2', title: 'Provide Stake', description: 'Deposit required stake (typically 10-20% of transfer amount) as security.', icon: '💰', }, { step: '3', title: 'Watchdog Claims', description: 'Automated watchdog bots claim valid transfers and challenge fraudulent ones.', icon: '🤖', }, { step: '4', title: 'Receive Tokens', description: 'Tokens are minted on destination chain after successful validation.', icon: '✅', }, ].map((item, index) => (
{item.step}
{item.icon}

{item.title}

{item.description}

 ))}
{/* Footer */}

© 2024 Counterstake Bridge. Built with ❤️ for the decentralized future.

{/* Toast Notifications */}
); } export default App;
